input.hint: Enter to send / Shift+Enter for newline

admin.title: Admin

adminSkills.binaryFile: Cannot preview: this file is binary.
adminSkills.selectTwoVersions: Select two different versions to compare.

adminSkills.clickViewDiff: Click a file to view diff

adminSkills.defaultLinkAllEnabled: All workspaces enable this skill by default (can be individually disabled)
adminSkills.defaultLinkAllDisabled: Each workspace must manually enable this skill
adminSkills.installFirst: Install this skill in the org first to manage workspace bindings.
adminSkills.uploadModalSubtitle: Upload a .zip file containing SKILL.md; it will be auto-installed to the org.
adminSkills.maxFileSize: Max 5 MB · SKILL.md must be in the root directory
adminSkills.versionExists: Version already exists, please update version in SKILL.md before publishing
adminSkills.publishDesc: Publish this skill to the org marketplace. Version is taken from SKILL.md frontmatter and cannot be modified after publishing. To update, bump version in SKILL.md and republish.

adminModels.title: Models & Providers
adminModels.subtitle: Manage LLM providers and available models
adminModels.noProvidersHint: Click the button at the top to add an LLM provider
adminModels.selectProvider: Select a provider to see details
adminModels.deleteHint: All associated models will be removed. This action cannot be undone.
adminModels.systemReadonly: System providers are defined by config and cannot be edited or deleted
adminModels.name: Name
adminModels.apiKeyEditHint: Leave blank to keep the current key
adminModels.modelTestHint: Save the model to enable connection test

adminSettings.title: Org Settings
adminSettings.subtitle: Organization-wide configuration
adminSettings.llmSubtitle: Pick the org default model and fallback chain. All workspaces inherit this configuration.
adminSettings.noModels: No models available. Add a provider and models on the Models page first.

scopeForm.orgHelp: One credential is shared by every enabled workspace in the organization.
scopeForm.workspaceHelp: One credential is shared by all members of this workspace.
scopeForm.userHelp: Each user provides their own credential before using this connector.
scopeForm.noneHelp: No API key is stored. The MCP server receives a short-lived Cubebox identity token.

promote.title: Promote MCP server
promote.description: Move {name} to organization scope so admins can bind it to workspaces.
promote.shareHelp: Convert the workspace credential into an organization credential and attach it to the promoted server.
promote.withoutHelp: Keep credentials workspace-local. Admins can add an organization credential later.
promote.noCredential: This server has no workspace credential to share. It will be promoted without an organization credential.

overrides.title: Workspace visibility
overrides.description: Workspaces inherit this org-wide MCP server by default. Disable it for specific workspaces here.

credential.managedBody: This credential is managed by organization administrators.
credential.passthroughBody: This connector uses Cubebox identity passthrough and does not store an API key.
credential.missingUser: Until you add a credential, this connector will not appear in your chat tools.
credential.missingViaBinding: This workspace needs its own credential before members can use this shared connector.
credential.missingWorkspace: Until a workspace credential is added, this connector will not appear for workspace members.

secret.writeOnly: The secret is write-only after saving.

tools.empty: No tools discovered yet. Refresh tools after the MCP server is reachable.

wsPanel.title: MCP Connectors
wsPanel.selectConnector: Select a connector to view details

wsPage.title: Workspace MCP connectors
wsPage.subtitle: Manage private connectors and credentials for this workspace.
wsPage.privateEmptyDesc: Add a connector that is visible only inside this workspace.
wsPage.sharedEmptyDesc: Organization admins can bind org-level MCP servers to this workspace.
wsPage.addSubtitle: Configure a connector owned by this workspace.
wsPage.scopeError: Workspace connectors only support workspace, per-user, or passthrough scope.

adminPage.title: MCP connectors
adminPage.subtitle: Manage organization-level MCP servers and credential scopes.
adminPage.emptyDesc: Add a server to expose external MCP tools to Cubebox agents.
adminPage.addSubtitle: Configure an organization connector and discover its MCP tools.
adminPage.deleteConfirm: Delete {name}? Bindings and credentials owned by this connector will also be removed.
adminPage.scopeError: Admin connectors only support organization, per-user, or passthrough scope.

mcpCatalog.empty: The catalog is empty. Run the catalog seeder to populate connectors.
mcpCatalog.adminOAuthNotice: This will install the connector org-wide. The token is issued to your account and shared by every workspace member. If you leave the org, the connector will need to be reauthorized.
mcpCatalog.workspaceOAuthNotice: This will install the connector for your account in this workspace only.
mcpCatalog.noneNotice: This connector requires no credentials. It will be installed and immediately usable.
mcpCatalog.multiFieldUnsupported: Multi-field static credentials are not supported yet. Use the OAuth tab instead.
mcpCatalog.pageSubtitleAdmin: Browse and install MCP connectors for your organization. Installed connectors are available to every workspace.
mcpCatalog.pageSubtitleWorkspace: Connect tools to this workspace. OAuth installs are private to you; org-wide connectors come from your administrator.
mcpCatalog.advancedSectionHelp: Custom (debug) connectors — bring-your-own URL configuration. Most users should install from the catalog above.
mcpCatalog.noWorkspaceDesc: Create a workspace before browsing the MCP catalog.
mcpCatalog.workspaceLensHelp: Pick which workspace lens to view the catalog from. Installs apply org-wide regardless of lens.

mcpOAuthReturn.successBody: Authorization succeeded. Returning you to where you started…
mcpOAuthReturn.errorStateInvalid: Authorization session expired. Please try again.
mcpOAuthReturn.errorPkceMissing: Authorization session expired. Please try again.
mcpOAuthReturn.errorTicketMissing: Authorization session expired. Please try again.
mcpOAuthReturn.errorTicketExpired: Authorization session expired. Please try again.
mcpOAuthReturn.errorTokenExchange: The provider rejected the authorization request. Please try again or contact support.
mcpOAuthReturn.errorInvalidServerState: We couldn't complete the authorization. Please contact support.
mcpOAuthReturn.errorInternal: Something went wrong. Please try again or contact support.
mcpOAuthReturn.missingParams: This page expects to be reached from an OAuth provider redirect.

persona.title: Persona
persona.description: Defines the agent's persona for every conversation in this workspace. Appended after the base system prompt.
persona.placeholder: e.g. You are a Python data analysis expert. Always provide runnable code examples.

skillsList.title: Skills
skillsList.subtitle: Browse, enable, and install skills available to this workspace.
skillsList.noMatchHint: Adjust the search or filter, or upload a workspace-private skill via "Add skill".
skillsList.selectSkill: Select a skill to view details

uploadModal.title: Upload skill (workspace-private)
uploadModal.description: Zip a SKILL.md plus its assets. The skill becomes installed only in this workspace.

fileRead.unchanged: File unchanged since the previous read.

fallback.unsupported: This file type does not support preview. Please download to view.

office.errorHint: The file could not be loaded by the external preview service.

conversationPage.notFoundBody: It may have been deleted, or it belongs to a different workspace.
conversationPage.noAccessBody: You are not a member of this workspace.
